sys_update_xml.name: sys_script_eab31dd73bac83107cf65c0f23e45a69
sys_update_xml.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update sys_domain="global" table="sys_script"><sys_script action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><abort_action>false</abort_action><access>package_private</access><action_delete>false</action_delete><action_insert>true</action_insert><action_query>false</action_query><action_update>false</action_update><active>true</active><add_message>false</add_message><advanced>true</advanced><change_fields>false</change_fields><client_callable>false</client_callable><collection>incident</collection><condition/><description/><execute_function>false</execute_function><filter_condition/><is_rest>false</is_rest><message/><name>incident</name><order>100</order><priority>100</priority><rest_method/><rest_method_text/><rest_service/><rest_service_text/><rest_variables/><role_conditions/><script><![CDATA[(function executeRule(current, previous /*null when async*/) {

	if(!current.short_description){
		short_description = (current.category ||'General')+ 'isssue reported';
	}
	if(!current.impact)current.impact =3;
	if(!current.urgency)current.urgency = 3;

	var pc = new incient_lite.PriorityCalc();
	pc.recalcFor(current);

})(current, previous);]]></script><sys_class_name>sys_script</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-05-04 18:18:13</sys_created_on><sys_domain>global</sys_domain><sys_domain_path>/</sys_domain_path><sys_id>eab31dd73bac83107cf65c0f23e45a69</sys_id><sys_mod_count>1</sys_mod_count><sys_name>incident</sys_name><sys_overrides/><sys_package display_value="01Incident_Lite" source="x_884051_01incid_0">24c241173b2c83107cf65c0f23e45a99</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="01Incident_Lite">24c241173b2c83107cf65c0f23e45a99</sys_scope><sys_update_name>sys_script_eab31dd73bac83107cf65c0f23e45a69</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-05-05 15:51:08</sys_updated_on><template/><when>before</when></sys_script><sys_translated_text action="delete_multiple" query="documentkey=eab31dd73bac83107cf65c0f23e45a69"/></record_update>

newquery="false" operator="=" or="false" value=""/></pause_condition><relative_duration_works_on>Task record</relative_duration_works_on><reset_action>cancel</reset_action><reset_condition/><resume_condition/><retroactive>false</retroactive><retroactive_pause>true</retroactive_pause><schedule display_value="24 x 7">38fa64edc0a8016400f4a5724b0434b8</schedule><schedule_source>sla_definition</schedule_source><schedule_source_field/><set_start_to/><start_condition table="incident">state=2^ORstate=1^EQ<item display_value="In Progress" endquery="false" field="state" goto="false" newquery="false" operator="=" or="false" value="2"/><item display_value="New" endquery="false" field="state" goto="false" newquery="false" operator="=" or="true" value="1"/><item endquery="true" field="" goto="false" newquery="false" operator="=" or="false" value=""/></start_condition><stop_condition table="incident">state=2^ORstate=6^ORstate=7^EQ<item display_value="In Progress" endquery="false" field="state" goto="false" newquery="false" operator="=" or="false" value="2"/><item display_value="Resolved" endquery="false" field="state" goto="false" newquery="false" operator="=" or="true" value="6"/><item display_value="Closed" endquery="false" sys_update_xml.name: sys_script_include_62050d5b3b2c83107cf65c0f23e45ac4
sys_update_xml.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="sys_script_include"><sys_script_include action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><access>package_private</access><active>true</active><api_name>x_884051_01incid_0.PriorityCalc</api_name><caller_access/><client_callable>false</client_callable><description/><mobile_callable>false</mobile_callable><name>PriorityCalc</name><sandbox_callable>false</sandbox_callable><script><![CDATA[var PriorityCalc = Class.create();
PriorityCalc.prototype = {
    initialize: function() {},
    // Map impact/urgency (1-3) to priority (1-5). Adjust as needed.
    map: function(impact, urgency) {
        var matrix = {
            '1_1 ': 1,
            '1_2 ': 2, 
            '1_3 ': 3,
            '2_1': 2,
            '2_2': 3,
            '2_3': 4,
            '3_1': 3,
            '3_2': 4,
            '3_3': 5
        };
		var key = impact + '_' + urgency;
		return matrix[key] || 3;
    },

	recalfor : function(inc){
		var impact = parseInt(inc.impact,10)||3;
		var urgency = parseInt(inc.urgency,10)||3;
		inc.priority = this.map(impact,urgency);
	},

    type: 'PriorityCalc'
};]]></script><sys_class_name>sys_script_include</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-05-04 18:01:05</sys_created_on><sys_id>62050d5b3b2c83107cf65c0f23e45ac4</sys_id><sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count><sys_name>PriorityCalc</sys_name><sys_package display_value="01Incident_Lite" source="x_884051_01incid_0">24c241173b2c83107cf65c0f23e45a99</sys_package><sys_policy>read</sys_policy><sys_scope display_value="01Incident_Lite">24c241173b2c83107cf65c0f23e45a99</sys_scope><sys_update_name>sys_script_include_62050d5b3b2c83107cf65c0f23e45ac4</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-05-04 18:01:05</sys_updated_on></sys_script_include></record_update>

sys_update_xml.name: sys_script_2a9635ef3ba047107cf65c0f23e45a38
sys_update_xml.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update sys_domain="global" table="sys_script"><sys_script action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><abort_action>false</abort_action><access>package_private</access><action_delete>false</action_delete><action_insert>true</action_insert><action_query>false</action_query><action_update>false</action_update><active>true</active><add_message>false</add_message><advanced>true</advanced><change_fields>false</change_fields><client_callable>false</client_callable><collection>incident</collection><condition/><description/><execute_function>false</execute_function><filter_condition/><is_rest>false</is_rest><message/><name>incident_lite_after</name><order>100</order><priority>100</priority><rest_method/><rest_method_text/><rest_service/><rest_service_text/><rest_variables/><role_conditions/><script><![CDATA[(function executeRule(current, previous /*null when async*/) {

	try{

		var grp = new GlideRecord('x_884051_01incid_0_u_assignment_matrix');
		grp.addQuery('u_category',current.category);
		grp.addQuery('u_priority',current.priority);
		grp.query();

		if(grp.next()){
			current.assignment_group = grp.u_group;

			var rota = new GlideRecord('x_884051_01incid_0_u_oncall_rota');
			rota.addQuery('u_group',grp.u_group);
			rota.orderBy('u_sequence');
			rota.query();
			if(rota.next()){
				current.assigned_to = rota.u_user;

			}
			current.update();


		}

	}catch(e){
		gs.error('auto-assign failed'+e);
	}

})(current, previous);]]></script><sys_class_name>sys_script</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-05-05 15:51:03</sys_created_on><sys_domain>global</sys_domain><sys_domain_path>/</sys_domain_path><sys_id>2a9635ef3ba047107cf65c0f23e45a38</sys_id><sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count><sys_name>incident_lite_after</sys_name><sys_overrides/><sys_package display_value="01Incident_Lite" source="x_884051_01incid_0">24c241173b2c83107cf65c0f23e45a99</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="01Incident_Lite">24c241173b2c83107cf65c0f23e45a99</sys_scope><sys_update_name>sys_script_2a9635ef3ba047107cf65c0f23e45a38</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-05-05 15:51:03</sys_updated_on><template/><when>after</when></sys_script><sys_translated_text action="delete_multiple" query="documentkey=2a9635ef3ba047107cf65c0f23e45a38"/></record_update>

sys_update_xml.name: sys_ui_section_4654011b3b2c83107cf65c0f23e45a0f
sys_update_xml.payload: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update><sys_ui_section caption="" section_id="4654011b3b2c83107cf65c0f23e45a0f" sys_domain="global" table="x_884051_01incid_0_u_oncall_rota" version="3" view=""><sys_ui_section action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><caption/><header>false</header><name>x_884051_01incid_0_u_oncall_rota</name><roles/><sys_class_name>sys_ui_section</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-05-04 17:02:33</sys_created_on><sys_domain>global</sys_domain><sys_domain_path>/</sys_domain_path><sys_id>4654011b3b2c83107cf65c0f23e45a0f</sys_id><sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count><sys_name>x_884051_01incid_0_u_oncall_rota</sys_name><sys_overrides/><sys_package display_value="01Incident_Lite" source="x_884051_01incid_0">24c241173b2c83107cf65c0f23e45a99</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="01Incident_Lite">24c241173b2c83107cf65c0f23e45a99</sys_scope><sys_update_name>sys_ui_section_4654011b3b2c83107cf65c0f23e45a0f</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-05-04 17:02:33</sys_updated_on><sys_user/><title>true</title><view display_value="Default view" name="NULL">Default view</view><view_name/></sys_ui_section></sys_ui_section></record_update>

sys_update_xml.name: sys_script_96adf5af3ba047107cf65c0f23e45a21
sys_update_xml.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update sys_domain="global" table="sys_script"><sys_script action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><abort_action>false</abort_action><access>package_private</access><action_delete>false</action_delete><action_insert>false</action_insert><action_query>false</action_query><action_update>true</action_update><active>true</active><add_message>false</add_message><advanced>true</advanced><change_fields>false</change_fields><client_callable>false</client_callable><collection>incident</collection><condition/><description/><execute_function>false</execute_function><filter_condition/><is_rest>false</is_rest><message/><name>Incident_lite_before </name><order>100</order><priority>100</priority><rest_method/><rest_method_text/><rest_service/><rest_service_text/><rest_variables/><role_conditions/><script><![CDATA[(function executeRule(current, previous /*null when async*/) {

	if(current.impact.changes() || current.urgency.changes()){

		var pc = new incident_lite.priorityCalc();
		pc.recalfor(current);
	}

})(current, previous);]]></script><sys_class_name>sys_script</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-05-05 16:06:34</sys_created_on><sys_domain>global</sys_domain><sys_domain_path>/</sys_domain_path><sys_id>96adf5af3ba047107cf65c0f23e45a21</sys_id><sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count><sys_name>Incident_lite_before </sys_name><sys_overrides/><sys_package display_value="01Incident_Lite" source="x_884051_01incid_0">24c241173b2c83107cf65c0f23e45a99</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="01Incident_Lite">24c241173b2c83107cf65c0f23e45a99</sys_scope><sys_update_name>sys_script_96adf5af3ba047107cf65c0f23e45a21</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-05-05 16:06:34</sys_updated_on><template/><when>before</when></sys_script><sys_translated_text action="delete_multiple" query="documentkey=96adf5af3ba047107cf65c0f23e45a21"/></record_update>

sys_update_xml.name: sys_db_object_546385573b2c83107cf65c0f23e45add
sys_update_xml.payload: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="sys_db_object"><sys_db_object action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><access/><actions_access>true</actions_access><alter_access>true</alter_access><caller_access/><client_scripts_access>true</client_scripts_access><configuration_access>false</configuration_access><create_access>true</create_access><create_access_controls>false</create_access_controls><delete_access>false</delete_access><filter_extension/><is_data_interface>false</is_data_interface><is_df_table>false</is_df_table><is_extendable>false</is_extendable><label>u_assignment_matrix</label><live_feed_enabled>false</live_feed_enabled><name>x_884051_01incid_0_u_assignment_matrix</name><number_ref/><provider_class/><read_access>true</read_access><scriptable_table>false</scriptable_table><super_class/><sys_class_name>sys_db_object</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-05-04 16:58:20</sys_created_on><sys_id>546385573b2c83107cf65c0f23e45add</sys_id><sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count><sys_name>01incid 0 U Assignment Matrix</sys_name><sys_package display_value="01Incident_Lite" source="x_884051_01incid_0">24c241173b2c83107cf65c0f23e45a99</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="01Incident_Lite">24c241173b2c83107cf65c0f23e45a99</sys_scope><sys_update_name>sys_db_object_546385573b2c83107cf65c0f23e45add</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-05-04 16:58:20</sys_updated_on><update_access>true</update_access><user_role/><ws_access>true</ws_access></sys_db_object></record_update>
